Summary: European transnational calls for materials research and innovation. Relevant for advanced materials, batteries, circular materials, manufacturing, electronics, sensors and industrial technology. Consortium route with national funding rules.

Title: TechSoup NGO software donations and IT support monitoring
MatchedKeywords: techsoup, ngo, software donation, it support, nonprofit technology, monitoring
Summary: Technology donation and discount route for NGOs. Not a grant, but useful for reducing IT costs of the Serbian NGO and strengthening project budgets with legal software, cloud, productivity, cybersecurity and nonprofit technology tools.

Title: European Urban Initiative calls monitoring
MatchedKeywords: european urban initiative, city, urban innovation, pilot, sme partner, call
Summary: EU route for innovative urban projects, usually led by cities or urban authorities. Good partner route for SMEs offering mobility, climate, energy, data, AI, waste, circular economy or digital public-service solutions that can be piloted with a municipality.

Title: EEA and Norway Grants available funding monitoring
MatchedKeywords: eea grants, norway grants, business innovation, green transition, funding, monitoring
Summary: European bilateral grants route that may support green transition, innovation, business development, civil society and regional cooperation in eligible beneficiary countries. Eligibility is country- and programme-specific, so use as a radar for Slovenia/Malta-related partnerships and regional calls where business innovation is included.

Title: EBRD Star Venture monitoring
MatchedKeywords: ebrd, star venture, startup, western balkans, advisory, scaling, monitoring
Summary: EBRD startup support route for high-potential ventures in EBRD regions, including advisory, mentoring and ecosystem support rather than a classic EU grant. Useful for Serbia and Western Balkans scaling, especially if paired with investor readiness or market expansion.

Title: NATO DIANA challenge monitoring
MatchedKeywords: nato diana, dual-use, accelerator, challenge, startup, transatlantic, monitoring
Summary: Transatlantic dual-use accelerator and challenge route for companies from eligible NATO countries. Not an EU grant and not a direct Serbia/Malta route if eligibility is restrictive, but relevant through Slovenia/UK/USA structures or partners if the technology is dual-use and challenge-aligned.

Title: CEF Digital calls monitoring
MatchedKeywords: cef digital, digital infrastructure, 5g, cloud, edge, consortium, monitoring
Summary: Connecting Europe Facility Digital route for digital infrastructure, 5G corridors, cloud/edge, backbone connectivity and digital service infrastructure. Usually not a small SME grant, but relevant if partnering with telecoms, infrastructure providers, municipalities or public-sector digital projects.

Title: Challenge.gov federal prize competitions monitoring
MatchedKeywords: usa, challenge.gov, prize, competition, federal innovation, monitoring
Summary: Official US federal prize and challenge portal. Useful for lighter competitions in AI, cyber, energy, health, data, climate and public-sector innovation. Eligibility is challenge-specific; some allow broader participation, while others restrict awards to US persons/entities.

Title: Innovation Loans Expression of Interest
SourceLevel: UK state / UK SME loan route
MatchedKeywords: uk, innovate uk, innovation loans, sme, close to market, monitoring
Summary: UK registered micro, small or medium sized enterprises can submit an Expression of Interest for loans for close-to-market innovative projects with strong commercial potential and UK economic/societal benefit. Not a grant and not directly useful without a UK SME, but important if a UK entity is created.

Title: V4 Gen Mini Grants 2026 monitoring
SourceLevel: V4 / Western Balkans regional cooperation grants
MatchedKeywords: visegrad, visegrad+, western balkans, serbia, regional cooperation, youth, mini grants, upcoming
Summary: Upcoming regional cooperation route from the International Visegrad Fund. V4 Gen Mini Grants open on 1 October 2026 for short-term cross-border youth mobility, with support up to EUR 10,000 and six focus areas. Main Visegrad, Visegrad+ and Strategic Grants were listed as open until 1 June 2026, so they are now archived for this cycle, but Visegrad+ remains important for Western Balkans partnerships involving Serbia when the next grant window opens.

Title: Israel Innovation Authority programmes monitoring
SourceLevel: Israel innovation grants and Horizon partner route
MatchedKeywords: israel innovation authority, grants, bilateral r&d, horizon europe, startup fund, pilots
Summary: Organizer route behind The DeepTechers. Israel Innovation Authority has many grant/incentive programmes, including bilateral R&D, European/Horizon participation support, pilots, startup fund, incubators, applied research and MNC collaboration. Mostly relevant if we have an Israeli partner or Israel market/deep-tech angle; not a direct route for Serbia/Malta/Slovenia alone.

Title: ESF+ digital skills and inclusion monitoring
MatchedKeywords: esf plus, digital skills, inclusion, training, ngo, slovenia, malta
Summary: EU skills and social-inclusion route implemented mostly through national and regional programmes. Relevant for Slovenia or Malta digital-skills projects, workforce upskilling, NGO training, inclusion, women/youth digital education and dissemination-heavy public-benefit work. Usually not a central SME R&D grant.

Title: Innovation Radar visibility and investor route
SourceLevel: EU innovation visibility and investor route
MatchedKeywords: innovation radar, eu-funded innovation, startup, investor, commercialisation
Summary: EU visibility route for innovations emerging from EU-funded projects. Not a grant by itself, but useful for finding partners, investors, comparable projects and commercialisation pathways. Good research tool for positioning EIC, Horizon, Digital Europe and cascade applications.

Title: Startup Europe ecosystem monitoring
MatchedKeywords: startup europe, startup, scaleup, ecosystem, networking, eu
Summary: EU startup ecosystem route for scaleup support, startup communities, networking and EU-backed ecosystem actions. Not usually a single grant application route, but useful for events, networks, accelerators, scaleup visibility and partner discovery.

Title: Creative Europe calls monitoring
SourceLevel: EU creative and media sector grants
MatchedKeywords: creative europe, media, digital culture, creative industries, grant
Summary: EU cultural and creative sector route. Relevant only if technology supports media, content, immersive/interactive storytelling, creative tools, digital culture, audience development, cultural heritage or NGO/creative dissemination.

Title: New European Bauhaus funding opportunities monitoring
SourceLevel: EU design, sustainability and built environment
MatchedKeywords: new european bauhaus, sustainability, design, built environment, community, funding
Summary: EU route for projects at the intersection of sustainability, inclusion, design, built environment, culture and community. Useful for smart buildings, urban tech, community pilots, sustainability storytelling and NGO dissemination around green/digital projects.

Title: CHIST-ERA ICT and emerging technologies calls monitoring
SourceLevel: European ICT and emerging technologies R&I
MatchedKeywords: chist-era, ict, emerging technologies, ai, cybersecurity, joint call
Summary: European transnational route for ICT, emerging technologies and research-driven innovation. Useful if there is a deep research angle in AI, cybersecurity, data, human-computer interaction, distributed systems or future internet technologies.

Title: COST Open Call networking route monitoring
MatchedKeywords: cost action, networking, dissemination, training, research cooperation
Summary: European networking route for COST Actions. Not a product grant, but useful for building research and stakeholder networks, dissemination, training schools, workshops and international positioning before larger Horizon or Eureka proposals.

Title: InvestEU Portal project visibility route
MatchedKeywords: investeu, investment, sme, startup, financing, project visibility
Summary: EU investment visibility route, not a grant. Useful for projects seeking investors, debt, equity or blended finance, especially once the company has a credible investment project, budget, revenue model and EU impact story. Pair with EIC, EIB/EIF or national grants as a financing layer.

Title: European Investment Fund SME finance route
MatchedKeywords: eif, sme finance, venture capital, guarantees, intermediaries, eu finance
Summary: EIF does not usually fund SMEs directly, but backs venture funds, guarantees and intermediaries. Important radar for finding EU-backed VC, debt, guarantees and financial intermediaries in Malta, Slovenia and nearby markets.

Title: NRC IRAP financial support for technology innovation
MatchedKeywords: canada, nrc irap, sme, technology innovation, monitoring
Summary: Canadian SME technology-innovation support route. The NRC site was temporarily unavailable during this pass, so keep it as a monitoring route and verify live eligibility before action. Likely useful only with a Canadian SME/subsidiary or Canadian partner.

Title: Innovation Centre Denmark funding and partner route monitoring
SourceLevel: Denmark innovation matchmaking and funding intelligence
MatchedKeywords: innovation centre denmark, icdk, funding opportunities, matchmaking, denmark, deep tech
Summary: Organizer route behind The DeepTechers. ICDK is not mainly a grant funder; it provides advisory, matchmaking, market introduction, research partners and access to funding opportunities for Danish companies, startups, researchers and innovation organisations. Useful if we build a Denmark partner route, especially through Copenhagen, DTU, life science, tech, green transition or US/Israel/Asia links.

Title: AWS Activate startup credits monitoring
MatchedKeywords: aws activate, startup credits, cloud credits, ai startup, infrastructure support
Summary: Organizer route behind The DeepTechers. AWS Activate is not a cash grant, but eligible startups can apply for cloud promotional credits: self-funded startups up to USD 5,000 and pre-Series B portfolio startups up to USD 200,000, with larger AI startup credits by invitation. Use only as infrastructure support, not as replacement for the Microsoft-stack build.

Title: DTU Skylab startup and partner route monitoring
SourceLevel: Denmark university innovation and startup programme
MatchedKeywords: dtu skylab, denmark, startup programme, funding, prototyping, deep tech, university partner
Summary: Ecosystem partner route from The DeepTechers. DTU Skylab is DTU's innovation hub with startup support, mentoring, facilities, prototyping and stated access to funding. Relevant as a Denmark/technical-university partner route, especially for robotics, hardware, smart manufacturing, life science, AI or deep-tech pilots.

Title: European DIGITAL SME Alliance opportunities monitoring
SourceLevel: EU ICT SME ecosystem and policy radar

Summary: EU ICT SME ecosystem route for policy updates, project partnerships, digital standards, cybersecurity, AI, skills and SME visibility. Not a grant programme by itself, but useful for finding consortium leads, dissemination partners, newsletters and calls around digital SME support.

Title: QuantERA calls monitoring
MatchedKeywords: quantera, quantum, deep tech, joint call, research, monitoring
Summary: European quantum technologies R&I route. Only relevant if the project has credible quantum, advanced sensing, quantum communication, quantum software or deep-tech research angle with strong academic/industrial partners.

Title: EIB venture debt monitoring
MatchedKeywords: eib, venture debt, scale-up, innovation finance, growth, monitoring
Summary: EIB venture debt is a later-stage innovation finance route for high-growth innovative companies, not an early grant. Keep it as a scale-up path if revenue, fundraising and EU impact become strong enough, especially through the Malta or Slovenia company.
